name: V2X, Inc.
description: V2X, Inc. is a leading provider of critical mission solutions and support services to defense, national security, and civilian clients globally. Formed by the 2022 merger of Vectrus and Vertex, the company leverages over 120 years of combined experience to deliver integrated solutions across aerospace, technology, operations, logistics, and training. With a workforce of approximately 16,000 professionals, V2X applies advanced capabilities, including AI and machine learning, to strengthen operational readiness, improve security, and ensure mission success for organizations operating in complex and challenging environments across 47 countries and territories worldwide.
